next_steps: Open http://<ct-ip>:8978 from the LAN and sign in with cloudbeaver.admin.username (vault HDC_CLOUDBEAVER_ADMIN_PASSWORD).
Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/cloudbeaver-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add database connections in the UI (e.g. PostgreSQL on vm-postgres-a via host.docker.internal or LAN IP).
Optional later: set cloudbeaver.public_url, add BIND A record and nginx-waf upstream with internal_only access.
